verses.text: Ka lawm itpa' tangin a leenggui lo a itna la ke'n hong sa ning: Ka lawm itpa in leitang a hoih mahmahna mualtung khatah leenggui lo khat a nei hi

Amah in lei to-in a suangte paikhia a, leenggui hoihte a suan hi. A laizangah tausang khat lam a, tua lo sungah leenggahsukna khuk khat a to hi. Amah in leenggah hoih a hong gah ding lamen a, ahih hangin gam leenggah hong gah mawk hi
Tu-in, Jerusalem khua-ah a tengte leh Judah mite aw, kei leh ka leenggui lo kikalah thu nong khenna ding uh ka hong thum hi
Ka leenggui lo-a' dingin ka hih nailoh ka hih ding a kilawm bang omlai ahi hiam? Leenggah hoih gah ding ka lamet laitakin bang hangin gam leenggah hong gah mawk ahi hiam
Tu-in, ka leenggui lo tungah ka hih ding thu note tungah kong gen ding hi. A daai ka lakhia ding a, kinemang ding hi. A gawl ka susia ding a, kituancil ding hi
Lokhulin ka bawl ding hi. Kipuah loin, kikholo ding a, tua lo sungah lingkung leh lingte a khang ding hi. Ama tungah meiite in zong guah a zuksak lohna dingin thu ka pia ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa' leenggui lo pen Israel mite hi a, Judah mite pen lungdamna tawh a suan kungte ahi hi. Amah in thutang lamen a, ahih hangin sisan luan'na om hi. Thumanna lamen a, ahih hangin kahna om hi.
Leitang tungah amau guak a teng ding dong zahin midangte-a' dingin mun khempeuh a bei matengin inn khatlekhat, lo khatlekhat gawmin a la thuah tawntung mite in gimna ngah ta hen
Vanglian Topa in ka zakna-ah hih bangin kiciam a, “A mantakin inn tampi tak hawmsuak ding a, a lian a hoih innte-ah a teng omlo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh leenggah lo eka sawm in phelpi khat dim bek gah ding a, khaici beem khat in an seu khat bek piangsak ding hi,” ci hi
Zingsang tungin tho-in, khamtheihzu delhin, leenggahzu in amaute a satsak pialpual matengin nitakin a tutkho mite in gimna ngah ta hen
Amaute in a pawi sung uhah laia lasakna leh harp lasakna, khuang, tamngai, leh leenggahzu, tampi a nei uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in Topa' sepnate donlo uh a, a khut tawh a bawlte zong mulo uh hi
Tua hi a, thu theihlohna hangin ka mite sal suak uh hi. A miliante uh gilkialin si dek uh a, a mihonte uh dangtakin keu uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Leinuai in a duhna khangsakin bangmah tawh a kiteh theilo zahin a kam ka beba a, Jerusalem' hoihna teng, a mipite, a mihonte, ama sunga a lungdam mite, a nawmvalh hi
Mi khempeuh a niamin kikoih suk hi. A kiphasak mite kiniamkhiat suk hi
Ahih hangin thutang sepna tawh Vanglian Topa in a liatna hong kilangsak a, a Siangtho Pasian in a mite a thukhenna tawh ama siangthona hong kilangsak hi
Tua ciangin tuunote in amau' tatna gamlak mun bangin tua khuasungah lopa ne ding uh a, a thau ganhingte leh keelnote a siasa khuapi sungah gamta ding uh hi

Amaute in, “I muh theihna dingin amah manlang sakin, ama nasep khawlsak ni. Israel-te' Siangtho Pa' deihna i theih theihna dingin naisakin tungsak ni!” ci-in ganhing kaih bangin khauzen tawh mawhna kai-in, khauhualpi tawh khialhna kai uh ahih manin gimna ngah ta uh hen
A phate sia ci-in, a siate pha ci a, khuavak dingin khuamial koihin, khuamial dingin khuavak koih a, a khum dingin a kha koihin, a kha dingin a khum a koihte in gimna ngah ta hen
Amau' mitah pil kisa a, amau' muhna-ah siam a kisate in gimna ngah ta hen
Leenggahzu tampi a dawnte, khamtheih zunek a hatte
mimawhte sumgolh tawh khah a, midikte a mawhsakte in gimna ngah ta hen

Tua ahih ciangin mei in buhkung keute kangtum a, meikuang sungah lopa keute a kattum bangin amaute' zung pen muatgawp ding a, amaute' pakpalhte leivui bangin vanah leengto ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Vanglian Topa' thu nialin Israel-te' Siangtho Pa' thu a simmawh uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa' hehna ama mite tungah hong khangin, a khut zanin amaute vatgawp a, mualte a kiling hi. Amaute' luanghawmte kongzing lampite-ah nin bangin a om hi. Hih bang teng hangin zong a hehna damzo nailoin ama khut kizanlai hi
Amah in a gamlapi-a om minam khat a sapna-in lim khat lak a, leimong panin hong paina dingin a sam hi. Manlang takin tua mite hong pai pah hi
Tua a hong pai mite kuamah gimlo uh a, kuamah tuklo uh hi. Kuamah lusu lo a, kuamah ihmu lo uh hi. Dialkaih khat zong kollo a, khedap khau khat zong kitat lo hi
Amau' thaltangte hiam a, a thal khempeuh uh a kikeeksa ahi hi. Amau' sakolte' khecinte meisuang bangin sak a, a leengpeite uh pingpei bangin manlang hi
Amaute' kikona pen humpinelkai hawk bang a, humpinelkai khanglaite bangin amaute a hawk uh hi. Amaute humhamin a sa nek ding uh man uh a, amaute in puakhia-in kuamah in honkhia zolo hi
Tua ni ciangin amaute in tuipi ging bangin Israel ngik ding uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in hih gamsung en leh khuamial leh lungzin'na bek om a, meiite in khua a mialsak hi.
